name: Voyage AI (State-of-the-Art Embedding and Reranking)

auth.notes: VOYAGE_API_KEY env var; from voyageai import Client

performance.notes: Competitive with OpenAI embeddings; typically 50-200ms per batch

agent_readiness.notes: High-quality embedding and reranking APIs from ex-Stanford AI lab. import voyageai. vo = voyageai.Client(api_key='va-...'). result = vo.embed(['text1', 'text2'], model='voyage-3', input_type='document'). result.embeddings → list of float vectors. result.total_tokens. vo.embed(texts, model='voyage-code-3') for code. Reranking: result = vo.rerank('query', documents, model='rerank-2', top_k=5). result.results[0].relevance_score. result.results[0].document. Async: import voyageai; vo = voyageai.AsyncClient(). Models: voyage-3, voyage-3-lite, voyage-finance-2, voyage-law-2, voyage-code-3, rerank-2, rerank-2-lite. Input types: 'query' vs 'document' (important distinction). LangChain, LlamaIndex integrations available.

gotchas: Must specify input_type='query' vs 'document' for best results
Models specialized by domain — code, finance, law, general
Pricing separate from OpenAI — budget separately
Newer provider — less community resources than OpenAI
best_when: RAG systems needing top-tier embedding quality
Legal or financial document search (domain-specific models)
When Anthropic recommends Voyage AI for embeddings with Claude
avoid_when: When local/private embeddings required (use fastembed or sentence-transformers)
Simple use cases where OpenAI text-embedding-3-small suffices
summary: Voyage AI provides top-tier embeddings and reranking. vo = voyageai.Client(); vo.embed(texts, model='voyage-3', input_type='document'). vo.rerank(query, docs, model='rerank-2', top_k=5). Specialized models: voyage-code-3, voyage-finance-2, voyage-law-2. Async client. LangChain/LlamaIndex integration. Usage-based pricing ~$0.06/1M tokens. Specify input_type='query'/'document'. Recommended by Anthropic for Claude+embedding workflows. API-only — no local option.
